ListEni.vpcId: The VPC ID to which the elastic network interface belongs
ListEni.instanceId: The ID of the instance to which the elastic network interface is attached
ListEni.name: The name of the elastic network interface
ListEni.privateIpAddress: The private IP (IPv4) address of the elastic network interface; supports single or multiple IP queries (multiple IPs separated by commas); single IP supports suffix fuzzy matching, multiple IPs require exact matching
ListEni.marker: The starting position for paginated list queries, a system-generated string
ListEni.maxKeys: The maximum number of items per page, not exceeding 1000; default value is 1000
